testcase.name: ldes_max_age_youngest_member [https://marineregions.org/feed.ttl]

failure.message: Youngest member is 587.25h old, exceeds maximum 24h

testcase.failure: The youngest member of the LDES feed at https://marineregions.org/feed.ttl has timestamp 2026-03-07T20:18:09+00:00, which is 587.25 hour(s) old. The maximum allowed age is 24 hour(s).
